P100.Description: Patient education on insulin usage, on diabetes, etc
Patient come for collecting lab results

General medical Exam for admission to old age home/ adoption/ camp/ driving liscence/ immigration and naturalization/ insurance certification/ marriage/ prison/ school admission/ sports competition/ PR2 / Medicolegal test
For the purpose of Mantoux test
Simple office visit procedures, for Eg: laceration repair/ excision / Incision and drainage/ debridement/ biopsy/ foreign body removal/ Aspiration/ Joint injection etc
Patient come in for Walk in

Simple office visit procedures, for Eg: laceration repair/ excision / Incision and drainage/ debridement/ biopsy/ foreign body removal/ Aspiration/ Joint injection etc
Patient come in for Walk in
